Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class Translations

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Translations
public class Translations extends Metadata

Java class for Translations complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Translations">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="bots" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}BotTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customApplications" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CustomApplicationTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customLabels" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CustomLabelTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customPageWebLinks" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CustomPageWebLinkTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customTabs" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CustomTabTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="desFieldTemplateMessages" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ExplainabilityMsgTemplateFieldTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="flowDefinitions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowDefinitionTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="identityVerificationCustomFieldLabels" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}IdentityVerificationFieldTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pipelineInspMetricConfigs" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PipelineInspMetricConfigTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="prompts" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PromptTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="quickActions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}GlobalQuickActionTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="reportTypes" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ReportTypeTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scontrols" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ScontrolTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getBots

      public List<BotTranslation> getBots()
      Gets the value of the bots property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the bots property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBots().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list BotTranslation

      Returns:
      The value of the bots property.

    • getCustomApplications

      public List<CustomApplicationTranslation> getCustomApplications()
      Gets the value of the customApplications property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the customApplications property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCustomApplications().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list CustomApplicationTranslation

      Returns:
      The value of the customApplications property.

      Gets the value of the customLabels property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the customLabels property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows:
